children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Neither the Secretary, nor any other actor, department, or agency of the Federal Government, shall condition the issuance of financial assistance under this part on an air carrier’s or contractor’s implementation of measures to enter into negotiations with the certified bargaining representative of a craft or class of employees of the air carrier or contractor under the Railway Labor Act ( et seq.) or the National Labor Relations Act ( et seq.), regarding pay or other terms and conditions of employment.45 U.S.C. 15129 U.S.C. 151

children.heading: Period of effect
children.label: b Period of effect
children.text: With respect to an air carrier or contractor to which financial assistance is provided under this part, this section shall be in effect with respect to the air carrier or contractor beginning on the date on which the air carrier or contractor is first issued such financial assistance and ending on .September 30, 2020
